summary: REFUSE is a brutalist marketing site for an independent Manchester streetwear label that drops limited, hand-printed seasonal collections and never restocks.

pages.title: Index
pages.purpose: Brand landing with hero, current-drop feature, ethos and newsletter.

pages.title: Manifesto
pages.purpose: Brand story, six guiding principles and how garments are made.

pages.title: Collection
pages.purpose: VOL.08 Concrete Gospel lookbook with the full 14-piece line-up.

pages.title: Product
pages.purpose: Dogma Heavyweight Hoodie product detail page with spec, sizes and related pieces.

pages.title: Schedule
pages.purpose: Drop calendar, drop rules and the full sold-out archive VOL.00 to VOL.09.

pages.title: Stores
pages.purpose: Studio store, global stockists, contact form, newsletter and FAQ.
